word: H6635 - צָבָא - tsâbâʼ - tsaw-baw' - Appointed time

sections.paragraph:
Original: צבאה צבא

Transliteration: tsâbâ' tsebâ'âh

Phonetic: tsaw-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. that which goes forth, army, war, warfare, host
    1. army, host
      1. host (of organised army)
      2. host (of angels)
      3. of sun, moon, and stars
      4. of whole creation
    2. war, warfare, service, go out to war
    3. service

Origin: from H6633

TWOT entry: 1865a,1865b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
